scenarios.title: AAPL normal move
scenarios.teaching_note: Baseline case: +1.2% daily change, well inside the 5% equity threshold.
scenarios.teaching_note_fr: Cas de base : +1,2 % de variation, bien en dessous du seuil actions de 5 %.

scenarios.title: EURUSD with ECB event
scenarios.query: Is the EURUSD price valid today?
scenarios.teaching_note: FX within 5% and supported by a central-bank event in market context.
scenarios.teaching_note_fr: FX dans les 5 % et justifié par un événement de banque centrale.

scenarios.title: TSLA earnings miss
scenarios.query: Validate TSLA.OQ. The stock moved more than 5% - should it still pass?
scenarios.teaching_note: Large move (-6.2%) but explained by an earnings event - APPROVED despite exceeding 5%.
scenarios.teaching_note_fr: Fort mouvement (-6,2 %) mais expliqué par des résultats - APPROVED malgré > 5 %.

scenarios.title: Bond spike, no news
scenarios.teaching_note: +8.4% on a bond with no credit or rates event - REJECTED by rule 2.
scenarios.teaching_note_fr: +8,4 % sur une obligation sans événement crédit ou taux - REJECTED (règle 2).

scenarios.title: Glencore stale price
scenarios.teaching_note: Price unchanged but not refreshed for 3 business days - ESCALATE under rule 3.
scenarios.teaching_note_fr: Prix inchangé mais non rafraîchi depuis 3 jours ouvrés - ESCALATE (règle 3).

scenarios.title: NVDA large move, no event
scenarios.teaching_note: +7.2% equity move with no market event on record - ESCALATE under rule 1.

scenarios.title: Live rule flip (NVDA)
scenarios.teaching_note: Demo moment: change rule 1 threshold from 5% to 10%, save, re-run - decision flips to APPROVED without code changes.
scenarios.teaching_note_fr: Moment clé : passez la règle 1 de 5 % à 10 %, enregistrez, relancez - APPROVED sans changer le code.
scenarios.live_flip_hint: In desk rules, change rule 1 from '5%' to '10%', save, and re-run this query.
scenarios.live_flip_hint_fr: Dans les règles desk, passez la règle 1 de « 5 % » à « 10 % », enregistrez et relancez.
